body: Hey Amara, following up on our earlier exchange about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) deal flow you mentioned — I wanted to get your read on a few of the climate infrastructure plays we've been seeing come through Sequoia's pipeline lately. There seems to be real momentum building around long-duration storage and grid flexibility, and I'd love to compare notes given your seat at the seed/Series-A stage. We've been evaluating a couple of teams working on the software layer for distributed energy resources, which feels like it might overlap with some of what you're tracking. Would you have 30 minutes sometime next week for a quick call? Happy to share a few deck summaries ahead of time if that's useful context.
